name: elliotllliu--agentshield-scanner
description: Scan AI agent skills, MCP servers, and plugins for security vulnerabilities. Use when: user asks to check a skill/plugin for safety, audit security, scan for backdoors/data exfiltration/credential leaks, or evaluate trust of a third-party skill. Triggers: "is this skill safe", "scan for security issues", "audit this plugin", "check for backdoors", "安全扫描", "扫一下安不安全".
